title: hieracium murorum subsp. luteobrunneum
intro: Hieracium murorum subsp. luteobrunneum is a subspecies of the Hieracium murorum plant, commonly known as wall hawk's-beard, a type of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). This plant is used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Hieracium murorum subsp. luteobrunneum include reducing inflammation and improving immune function, as well as potential uses in treating conditions such as arthritis and digestive issues. Herbal preparations of this plant may include teas, infusions, and tinctures, although further research is needed to fully understand its medicinal potential and optimal preparation methods.
